ogTitle: Miandetta vs Micalo Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Miandetta and Micalo Island.
heading: Miandetta vs Micalo Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Miandetta, New South Wales and Micalo Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Miandetta has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Micalo Island (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Miandetta or Micalo Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Miandetta has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Micalo Island scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Miandetta scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Micalo Island scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Miandetta or Micalo Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Miandetta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
